name: workflow-universe-server
description: Inspect and steer local Workflow universes through the packaged Universe Server MCP interface.
long_description: Workflow Universe Server packages the repo's multi-universe control plane as a local MCP Bundle for Claude Desktop and other MCPB-capable clients. It lets users inspect universe state, read output and canon, submit collaboration requests, write direct daemon notes, and manage custom workflow graph extensions against a selected universe base directory.

tools.name: universe
tools.description: Inspect, read, and modify universe state through the coarse-grained Universe Server control tool.

tools.name: extensions
tools.description: Register, inspect, approve, disable, and remove custom workflow graph nodes.

universe_base.title: Universe Base Directory
universe_base.description: Select the directory that contains your universe folders, such as this repo's output directory.

default_universe.title: Default Universe
default_universe.description: Optional universe ID to use when the client does not pass one explicitly.
